ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the demographic group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the demographic group */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count in the demographic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES race_categories ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary entry */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry this beneficiary belongs to */,
  "bene_yes" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries in this demographic group */,
  "bene_no" INTEGER /* Number of non-beneficiaries in this demographic group */,
  "total_bene" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in this demographic group */,
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary percentage entry */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data import entry */,
  "export_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data export entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_export_id FOREIGN KEY ("export_id") REFERENCES data_exports ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_percentage_id FOREIGN KEY ("percentage_id") REFERENCES beneficiary_percentages ("percentage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., _18-39) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary percentage entry */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary entry this percentage belongs to */,
  "bene_yes_pct" REAL /* Percentage of beneficiaries in this demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the data export */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data administrator, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security protocol */,
  "security_protocol" TEXT /* Name of the security protocol */,
  "security_description" TEXT /* Description of the security protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "audited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who audited the data */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_audited_by FOREIGN KEY ("audited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance entry */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance entry */,
  "complied_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who complied with the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_complied_by FOREIGN KEY ("complied_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date of the procedure */,
  "procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the procedure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the procedure */,
  "procedure_status" TEXT /* Status of the procedure (e.g., active, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
